title: SchemaFX Schema
description: Structural schema for SchemaFX application definitions.

minCompatVersion.description: Minimum SchemaFX spec version needed for this schema.

connectors.description: Map of connector id to Connector definition.

tables.description: Map of table/slice id to Table or Slice definition. Slices (with 'type': 'slice') are filtered projections of a base Table.

views.description: Map of view id to View definition.

workflows.description: Map of workflow id to Workflow definition.

records.description: Named single-row lookups for JSON Logic. The key "user" is reserved.

exports.description: Map of export id to Export definition. Each entry exposes application data via an external API.

Identifier.description: Entity ID format. Letter followed by alphanumerics, underscores, or hyphens.

examples: EEEE, MMMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a

oneOf.description: Locale map with a required '_default' value.

defaultView.description: Default view to display on startup.

primaryColor.description: Hex color code for primary color

secondaryColor.description: Hex color code for secondary color

titleSeparator.description: Separator between view name and app name in document title

showViewInTitle.description: Whether to show the view name in the document title

Formatting.description: Default formatting patterns for dates, times, numbers, and currency.

ConnectorPoll.description: Polling configuration for data source changes.

queryString.description: Additional connection parameters as a SecretRef.

ConnectorConfigGraphQLTable.description: GraphQL operation bindings for a table.

operations.description: Map of CRUD operations to their GraphQL query/mutation bindings

ConnectorConfigGraphQLOperation.description: Binding to a specific GraphQL query or mutation.

operation.description: The GraphQL operation name (top-level query or mutation field).

operationType.description: Whether the operation is a query or mutation.

resultPath.description: JSONPath to result data within the GraphQL response.

rootEndpoint.description: The OData service root endpoint URL

ConnectorConfigODataTable.description: OData entity set binding for a table.

entitySet.description: OData entity set name as defined in the service metadata document.

key.description: Entity key property name used for single-entity GET/UPDATE/DELETE requests.

select.description: Property names to include via the OData $select system query option.

expand.description: Navigation property names to inline via the OData $expand system query option.

document.description: Embedded OpenAPI document (takes precedence over documentUrl).

ConnectorConfigOpenAPITable.description: OpenAPI operation bindings for a table.

table.description: The table id this binding applies to

operations.description: Map of operations to their OpenAPI operation bindings

resultPath.description: JSONPath to result data in response.

endpoint.description: The SPARQL query endpoint URL (SPARQL Protocol)

method.description: HTTP method for SPARQL query requests.

tables.description: Per-table RDF class and predicate mappings.

ConnectorConfigSPARQLTable.description: RDF class and predicate mappings for a single table.

table.description: The table id this mapping applies to.

classUri.description: RDF class URI (rdf:type) for resources in this table.

subjectTemplate.description: RFC 6570 URI template for constructing the subject IRI from field values.

graphUri.description: Named graph URI scoping queries and updates for this table.

fields.description: Map of RDF predicate URI to field id. Keys are predicate URIs; values are field identifiers in the table. A single field may appear as the value of multiple predicates.

formats.description: Supported MIME types for data files.

pattern.description: Regex pattern for matching file names.

feedUrl.description: The RSS or Atom feed URL.

ConnectorConfigRSSTable.description: RSS/Atom feed item field mappings for a table.

table.description: The table id the feed items map to

itemPath.description: JSONPath to the items array in the parsed feed.

fields.description: Map of table field id to feed item property name.

ConnectorConfigSOAP.description: SOAP web service connector. Requires 'wsdlUrl' or 'wsdl'.

wsdlUrl.description: URL to the external WSDL document

ConnectorConfigSOAPTable.description: SOAP operation bindings for a single table

table.description: The table id this binding applies to

operations.description: Map of operations to their SOAP operation bindings

ConnectorConfigSOAPOperations.description: Per-operation SOAP bindings. Each key maps to a SOAP operation binding.

ConnectorConfigSOAPOperation.description: Binding from a logical CRUD operation to a specific SOAP operation

operation.description: The SOAP operation name as defined in the WSDL portType/binding

ConnectorConfigOther.description: Custom connector for modules and third-party integrations.

serviceAccountEmail.description: For JWT Bearer Token Grant (requires privateKey).

privateKey.description: For JWT Bearer Token Grant (requires serviceAccountEmail).

impersonateUser.description: User to impersonate (requires serviceAccountEmail and privateKey).

ConnectorAuthOAuth2.description-note: Runtime MUST validate iss, aud, exp claims. Key rotation SHOULD be supported.

TextStyle.description: Text styling properties for table cells.

FormatRule.description: Conditional formatting rule for table rows.

columns.description: Field IDs to style when condition matches.

Audit.description: Audit configuration for tracking data mutations.

destinationTable.description: Table where audit entries are stored.

fields.description: Subset of field IDs to audit (all if omitted).

condition.description: Condition to filter which mutations are audited.

filter.description: Row filter condition (security boundary). Combined with view.filter via AND.

RecordDef.description: Named record definition for single-row lookup.

Slice.description: Slice definition (filtered view of a base table).

columns.description: Field IDs to expose (all if omitted).

additionalFields.description: Additional calculated fields for this slice.

filter.description: Additional row filter (combined with base table filter).

actions.description: Base table action IDs to expose.

workflows.description: Workflow IDs available from this slice.

versionField.description: Field ID carrying the concurrency token.

readTransform.description: Transform raw source value when reading.

format.description: Semantic format hint for input rendering and validation.

multiline.description: Render as a multi-line text area.

format.description: Unicode CLDR/ICU number format pattern for integers

FieldConfigDecimal.description: Decimal field configuration (fixed-point precision for currency/financial)

format.description: Unicode CLDR/ICU number format pattern for decimals

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values

scale.description: Number of decimal places. MUST be less than or equal to precision.

step.description: Positive step increment for decimal inputs.

FieldConfigDecimal.description-note: FLD-DEC-001: Implementations MUST reject schemas where scale > precision.

FieldConfigFloat.description: Float field configuration (floating-point numbers for scientific/measurement data)

format.description: Unicode CLDR/ICU number format pattern for floats

step.description: Positive step increment for float inputs.

labelTrue.description: Label to display when value is true

labelFalse.description: Label to display when value is false

FieldConfigDate.description: Date field configuration (date only, no time component)

format.description: Display format using Unicode CLDR/ICU date pattern. For display only.

FieldConfigDateTime.description: DateTime field configuration (date with time component)

format.description: Display format using Unicode CLDR/ICU date-time pattern. For display only.

FieldConfigTime.description: Time field configuration (time only, no date component)

format.description: Display format using Unicode CLDR/ICU time pattern. For display only.

FieldConfigReference.description: Reference field linking to another table.

FieldConfigFile.description: File upload field backed by a storage table.

pattern.description: ECMAScript regex pattern for validating file names.

deleteWithRow.description: Whether files should be automatically deleted when the parent row is deleted.

mediaType.description: Media type describing how file content is conveyed. Implementations interpret this value to determine the encoding or framing of file data. Not a closed enumeration — implementations MAY define additional values.

FieldConfigArray.description: Array field configuration for lists of values. The 'subtype' defines the type of each element in the array using a FieldConfig.

subtype.description: The field configuration for each element in the array. Defines the data type and constraints of array items.

minItems.description: Minimum number of items in the array

maxItems.description: Maximum number of items in the array

FieldConfigCalculated.description: Computed field — value derived at runtime via JSON Logic. Read-only; never persisted. Evaluated per-row in topological order. Circular dependencies rejected at load time (FLD-CAL-006).

calculation.description: JSON Logic rule computing the field value. Supports var references, dot-notation for reference traversal, and custom operators (related, table, record).

format.description: FieldConfig defining the type and display format of the computed value.

NavigateProtocol.description: Allowed navigate action protocols. 'http' and 'https' open web URLs; 'mailto', 'tel', and 'sms' delegate to the OS default handler; 'view' navigates to an in-app view. Dangerous schemes (javascript, data, vbscript, file, ftp) are forbidden.

NavigateProtocolOrCondition.description: Static allowed protocol string or a RowCondition that evaluates to one at runtime.

ActionConfigGrouped.description: Grouped action (executes multiple actions in sequence).

ActionConfigBulk.description: Bulk action (applies action to multiple selected rows).

filter.description: Row filter condition. Combined with table.filter via AND; additive only.

ViewConfigTable.description: Table view configuration. Pagination overrides the table-level setting for this view only.

fields.description: List of field ids to display in order

pagination.description: OPTIONAL pagination configuration for this view. When present, overrides the table-level 'pagination' for this view only.

fields.description: List of field ids to display in order
List of field ids to display in order

url.description: Target URL. MUST use http/https and MUST NOT resolve to a private or reserved IP (see SSRF Protection in runtime spec). Dynamic values validated at runtime.

condition.description: JSON Logic rule evaluated against the workflow execution context.

then.description: Actions to execute when the condition is true.

else.description: Actions to execute when the condition is false.

WorkflowActionConfigSwitch.description: Multi-way branching action. Evaluates an expression and executes the first matching case.

expression.description: JSON Logic expression evaluated against the workflow execution context. The result is compared against each case's 'value' using strict equality.

cases.description: Ordered list of cases; first match wins.

default.description: Actions to execute when no case matches.

WorkflowActionConfigParallel.description: Concurrent execution action. Runs multiple independent branches simultaneously.

failStrategy.description: Behavior on branch failure: fail_fast cancels remaining branches immediately; settle waits for all branches and returns a combined result.

WorkflowParallelBranch.description: A single branch within a parallel action. Each branch has an identifier and a list of actions to execute sequentially.

id.description: Branch id (unique within the parallel action)

name.description: OPTIONAL display name for the branch

actions.description: Actions to execute sequentially within this branch.

RetryPolicy.description: Retry policy for transient failure recovery.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts after the initial failure (total executions = 1 + maxAttempts).

delay.description: Base delay between retries. Defaults to PT1S.

backoff.description: Backoff strategy: fixed (constant delay), linear (n × base), or exponential (2^(n-1) × base).

retryOn.description: OPTIONAL list of error codes that are eligible for retry. When present, only failures with a matching error code are retried; other errors immediately invoke the onError handler. When omitted, all errors are retryable.

WorkflowErrorHandler.description: Error handling strategy after a failed action (post-retry).

strategy.description: stop: halt workflow. continue: proceed to next action. goto: jump to a named action.

goto.description: Target action id within the same action list. Required when strategy is 'goto'.

maxInstances.description: Maximum concurrent instances. When omitted, no limit is enforced.

onLimit.description: Behavior when limit is reached: queue (FIFO wait), skip (discard), or cancel_running (cancel oldest).

TriggerConcurrency.description: Per-trigger concurrency limits, independent of workflow-level concurrency.

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum concurrent workflow instances from this trigger. When omitted, no limit is enforced.

onLimit.description: Behavior when limit is reached: queue (FIFO wait), skip (discard), or cancel_running (cancel oldest from this trigger).

WorkflowTransaction.description: Transaction semantics for a workflow. Controls atomicity across multi-step actions.

mode.description: none: each action commits independently. all_or_nothing: single DB transaction with full rollback on failure. compensate: run compensation actions in reverse on failure.

ISO8601DateTime.description: ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone designator (RFC 3339 profile).

Pagination.description: Pagination configuration for controlling how records are fetched and displayed.

mode.description: Pagination strategy: offset (page/limit arithmetic), cursor (opaque single-field cursor), or keyset (composite multi-field cursor).

maxPageSize.description: Maximum records per page. MUST be >= defaultPageSize (PAG-006).

cursorField.description: Field ID used for cursor pagination.

keysetFields.description: Field IDs used for keyset pagination.

JsonLogicRule.description: A JSON Logic expression (https://jsonlogic.com). Supports standard operators plus custom SchemaFX operators: related (child table rows), table (all rows), record (single-row lookup). Implementations MUST validate that the top-level key is a recognized operator from the allowed set and MUST reject unknown operators to prevent injection.

BooleanOrCondition.description: Static boolean or a RowCondition that evaluates to a boolean at runtime.

DefaultValueOrCondition.description: Static literal (string, number, boolean, null, or array) or a RowCondition that computes a default value at runtime.

StringOrCondition.description: Static non-empty string or a RowCondition that evaluates to a string at runtime.

ViewIdOrCondition.description: Static view id or a JSON Logic rule that evaluates to a view id at runtime.

RowCondition.description: JSON Logic rule evaluated against the current row's field values.

supportedLocales.description: BCP 47 locale tags supported by this application.

Tenancy.description: Multi-tenant data isolation for a table.

strategy.description: Isolation strategy. 'row': row-level isolation via a discriminator column on this table. 'schema': schema-level isolation where each tenant maps to a separate database schema. 'database': database-level isolation where each tenant maps to a separate database/connector.

identifier.description: Configuration for resolving the tenant identifier from each incoming request.

column.description: Discriminator column id for row-level isolation.

enforcement.description: strict: reject requests without a valid tenant id. permissive: allow unauthenticated tenant access (admin/superuser contexts).

TenancyIdentifier.description: How to resolve the tenant ID from a request.

source.description: Where to extract the tenant identifier from. 'header': from an HTTP request header. 'jwt': from a JWT claim (requires a decoded JWT in the request context). 'query': from a URL query parameter.

key.description: The header name, JWT claim path, or query parameter name to read the tenant identifier from.

AuthUserFields.description: Auth field mappings for the user table.

AuthMethodTypeEnum.description: Authentication method type identifier. Used by AuthMethod and AuthMFAFactor to ensure consistent type references.

algorithm.description: Password hash algorithm. Only modern memory-hard algorithms are permitted.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of consecutive failed login attempts before the account is locked.

resetOnSuccess.description: Reset failed attempts after a successful login.

message.description: Message shown when the rule fails.

certificate.description: IdP signing certificate for validating SAML assertions.

baseDn.description: Base Distinguished Name for user searches.

bindDn.description: Bind DN for the service account used to search.

bindPassword.description: Bind password for the service account.

userFilter.description: LDAP user filter template. {{username}} substituted at runtime with RFC 4515 escaping.

headerName.description: HTTP header name to read the API key from.

key.description: The field storing the hashed API key value.

user.description: Reference field pointing to the user table.

active.description: OPTIONAL boolean field indicating whether the key is active.

credentialId.description: The field storing the base64url-encoded credential ID returned by the authenticator.

publicKey.description: The field storing the COSE-encoded public key for signature verification.

user.description: Reference field pointing to the user table.

algorithm.description: HMAC algorithm for TOTP generation. SHA1 is the default per RFC 6238 and has the broadest authenticator app support.

digits.description: Number of digits in the generated OTP code.

period.description: Time step duration in seconds. Defines how often a new code is generated.

digits.description: Number of digits in the generated OTP code.

name.description: The module or integration name identifying this custom auth method.

AuthMethodEmailOTP.description: Email one-time password or magic link authentication.

digits.description: Number of digits in the generated OTP code. Only applies when mode is 'code'.

enabled.description: Whether 'remember this device' is available to users.

identifier.description: Claim path for the user identifier.

email.description: Claim path for the user's email.

displayName.description: Claim path for the user's display name.

role.description: Claim path for the user's role.

refreshable.description: Whether sessions can be refreshed/extended before expiration.

method.description: Recovery delivery method. 'email': send a reset link/code to the user's email address (resolved from userFields.email or userFields.identifier). 'sms': send a reset code via SMS to the user's phone number (requires a phone field in the user table). 'admin': no self-service recovery; account access is restored by an administrator.

requirePasswordChange.description: Require a new password after recovery.

captureContext.description: Include request context in audit entries.

window.description: Rolling time window for counting authentication attempts.

headerName.description: Header name used for caller identification.

requireEmailVerification.description: Require email verification for new accounts.

emailChangeVerification.description: Require email re-verification after email changes.

phoneChangeVerification.description: Require phone re-verification after phone changes.

selfDeactivation.description: Allow users to deactivate their own accounts.

dataExport.description: Allow users to export their data.

ErrorCode.description: [NORMATIVE] Machine-readable error code. Implementations MUST use these codes in all error responses.

ErrorSeverity.description: [NORMATIVE] Error severity level. 'fatal' errors prevent the operation from completing. 'error' indicates the operation failed but the system is in a recoverable state. 'warning' indicates partial success or degraded behavior. 'info' provides supplementary diagnostic context.

FieldError.description: [NORMATIVE] Per-field validation error detail. Associates a specific field with its validation failure. Implementations MUST include this for VALIDATION_FIELD_* error codes to enable precise client-side field-level error rendering.

field.description: The field ID that failed validation

code.description: Machine-readable error code specific to this field error

message.description: Human-readable description of the validation failure

actual.description: The actual value that was provided

ErrorResponse.description: [NORMATIVE] Standard error response envelope. All API error responses MUST conform to this structure. The 'code' field enables programmatic error handling; 'message' provides human-readable context. Implementations MUST NOT expose sensitive data (internal paths, stack traces, secrets) in error responses.

message.description: Human-readable error description. MUST be actionable and specific per the error reporting requirements in Runtime.md

details.description: Array of per-field validation errors. Present for VALIDATION_* codes. Implementations MUST include this for validation failures to enable field-level error rendering

retryable.description: Whether the client MAY retry the request. Implementations MUST set this to true for transient failures (timeouts, temporary unavailability) and false for deterministic failures (validation, not found)

retryAfter.description: Suggested retry delay in milliseconds. Present only when 'retryable' is true

requestId.description: Opaque request identifier for correlating errors with server-side logs. Implementations SHOULD include this for all error responses

examples.message: Request validation failed with 2 field errors

details.message: Invalid value 'pending'. Allowed values: active, inactive, archived

ExportGraphQL.description: GraphQL export configuration. Exposes selected tables as a GraphQL API.

endpoint.description: Path at which the GraphQL API is served. MUST start with '/'.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for clients consuming this export.

tables.description: Map of table id to GraphQL resource configuration.

ExportAuth.description: Authentication configuration for clients accessing an exported API (discriminated by type).

ExportAuthNone.description: No authentication — the exported endpoint is publicly accessible.

ExportAuthApiKey.description: API key authentication. Clients must supply a valid API key.

headerName.description: HTTP header used to pass the API key.

location.description: Where the API key is expected — HTTP header or query string parameter.

ExportAuthJWT.description: JWT Bearer token authentication. Clients must supply a valid signed JWT in the Authorization header.

jwksUrl.description: URL of the JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) used to verify JWT signatures.

issuer.description: Expected JWT issuer (iss claim). Tokens with a different issuer are rejected.

audience.description: Expected JWT audience (aud claim). Tokens not containing this audience are rejected.

ExportAuthOAuth2.description: OAuth2 token introspection authentication. The server validates inbound Bearer tokens via introspection (RFC 7662).

clientId.description: Client ID used to authenticate introspection requests to the authorization server.

clientSecret.description: Client secret used to authenticate introspection requests to the authorization server.

requiredScopes.description: Scopes that must be present in the token introspection response for access to be granted.

endpoint.description: Base path at which the OData service is served. MUST start with '/'. The service document is available at this path, and the metadata document at '{endpoint}/$metadata'.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for clients consuming this export.

tables.description: Map of table id to OData entity set configuration.

ExportODataTableMapping.description: Mapping between a table and its OData entity set and entity type.

entitySetName.description: OData entity set name (plural resource name exposed in the service document).

entityTypeName.description: OData entity type name (singular type name used in the CSDL metadata).

operations.description: Controls which CRUD operations are exposed for this entity set. All default to false except 'list' and 'read'.

read.description: Whether to expose GET /{entitySet}({key}) (single entity read).

update.description: Whether to expose PATCH /{entitySet}({key}) (partial entity update).

replace.description: Whether to expose PUT /{entitySet}({key}) (full entity replacement).

ExportGraphQLTableMapping.description: Mapping between a table and its corresponding GraphQL resource.

typeName.description: GraphQL object type name for rows of this table.

queryField.description: Root Query field name for listing records of this type.

singleQueryField.description: Root Query field name for fetching a single record by primary key.

mutations.description: Controls which write mutations are exposed for this type. All default to false.

create.description: Whether to expose a createX mutation.

update.description: Whether to expose an updateX mutation.

delete.description: Whether to expose a deleteX mutation.

endpoint.description: Base path at which the SOAP service is served. MUST start with '/'. The auto-generated WSDL is published at '{endpoint}?wsdl'.

namespace.description: XML target namespace for the generated WSDL and XSD types.

serviceName.description: WSDL service name. Defaults to 'Service' if omitted.

soapVersion.description: SOAP protocol version for the generated binding.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for clients consuming this export.

tables.description: Map of XSD type name to SOAP type and operation configuration. The key becomes the generated XSD complex type name (PascalCase). A single table may appear under multiple type names.

ExportSOAPTableMapping.description: Mapping between a table and its SOAP type and operations. The runtime generates XSD complex types, WSDL messages, and port type operations from this configuration. The key in the parent map is used as the XSD complex type name.

filter.description: Optional JSON Logic filter applied to rows. Only matching rows are exposed through the generated SOAP operations.

operations.description: Controls which SOAP operations are generated for this type. 'list' and 'get' default to true; write operations default to false.

list.description: Whether to generate a GetAll{typeName} operation returning a list.

get.description: Whether to generate a Get{typeName} operation for a single record by key.

create.description: Whether to generate a Create{typeName} operation.

update.description: Whether to generate an Update{typeName} operation.

delete.description: Whether to generate a Delete{typeName} operation.

endpoint.description: Base path at which the file export endpoints are served. MUST start with '/'.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for clients consuming this export.

data.description: Map of relative path (starting with '/') to file export table configuration. A single table may appear under multiple paths.

ExportFilesTableMapping.description: Configuration for exporting a single table as a downloadable file.

table.description: ID of the table to export.

filter.description: Optional JSON Logic filter applied to rows before export. Only matching rows are included in the exported file.

formats.description: Available MIME types for this export.

encoding.description: Character encoding for the exported file.

endpoint.description: Path at which the SPARQL query endpoint is served. MUST start with '/'.

updateEndpoint.description: Path at which the SPARQL Update endpoint is served. Defaults to the query endpoint. MUST start with '/'.

method.description: HTTP method for SPARQL query requests.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for clients consuming this export.

tables.description: Map of table id to SPARQL RDF resource configuration.

allOf.description: Common RDF class and predicate mapping properties shared by SPARQL connectors and exports.

classUri.description: RDF class URI (rdf:type) for resources in this table.

subjectTemplate.description: RFC 6570 URI template for constructing the subject IRI from field values.

graphUri.description: Named graph URI scoping queries and updates for this table.

fields.description: Map of RDF predicate URI to field id. Keys are predicate URIs; values are field identifiers in the table. A single field may appear as the value of multiple predicates.

ExportSPARQLTableMapping.description: Mapping between a table and its RDF class and predicate bindings for the SPARQL export.

operations.description: Controls which operations are exposed for this resource. 'query' and 'describe' default to true; write operations default to false.

query.description: Whether to allow SELECT queries against this resource.

describe.description: Whether to allow DESCRIBE queries for individual resources.

insert.description: Whether to allow INSERT DATA operations.

delete.description: Whether to allow DELETE DATA operations.

endpoint.description: Base path at which the REST API is served. MUST start with '/'. Individual table resources are mounted beneath this path.

openApiVersion.description: OpenAPI specification version for the generated document.

info.description: Overrides for the generated OpenAPI info object. When omitted, values are derived from app metadata.

version.description: API version string. Defaults to app.version.

servers.description: Server entries for the generated OpenAPI document. When omitted the runtime infers the server from the request origin.

defaultPageSize.description: Default page size for list endpoints. Can be overridden per-table.

maxPageSize.description: Maximum page size a client may request.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for clients consuming this export. The runtime generates the corresponding 'securitySchemes' in the OpenAPI document.

tags.description: Additional OpenAPI tags. The runtime auto-generates one tag per table; entries here are merged.

tables.description: Map of resource paths to OpenAPI table settings.

ExportOpenAPITableMapping.description: OpenAPI settings for one resource path.

table.description: ID of the source table whose fields drive the generated schemas and operations.

tag.description: OpenAPI tag name for grouping operations. Defaults to table name.

summary.description: Short summary used in the generated path item. Defaults to table name.

description.description: Longer description for the generated path item.

filter.description: Optional server-side filter applied to all operations. Only matching rows are visible through the API.

operations.description: Controls which REST operations the runtime generates. 'list' and 'read' default to true; write operations default to false.

list.description: Whether to generate GET {path} (collection list with pagination).

response.description: Response shaping for generated endpoints. Controls which fields appear in responses and how collections are wrapped.

fields.description: Field IDs to include in responses. When omitted, all non-hidden fields are included.

exclude.description: Field IDs to exclude from responses. Applied after 'fields' inclusion.

envelope.description: Collection envelope format. When omitted, the runtime wraps list responses in { data: [...], pagination: {...} }.

dataKey.description: JSON key for the array of items.

totalKey.description: JSON key for the total record count. Set to null to omit.

pageKey.description: JSON key for the current page number.

pageSizeKey.description: JSON key for the page size.

queryParameters.description: Controls which query parameters the runtime generates for list endpoints.

search.description: Whether to generate a full-text 'q' search parameter.

pageSize.description: Default page size for list operations on this resource. Overrides the export-level defaultPageSize.

ExportOther.description: Custom export handled by a registered module.
